problem id: 6c56e99a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  01001000 -> 01001011
  10111100 -> 11011011
  00001000 -> 11101011
  00001101 -> 01100011
  11011111 -> 10101101
  11101110 -> 01010111
  01111101 -> 10111011
  11011000 -> 00100011
  10101111 -> 01110100
  11100101 -> 11000101

query: 10000101
predicted answer: 00110101
